LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.Cheat.Infuse.Label: Infuse
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.Cheat.Infuse.Descrip: Select an infusion, then choose an infusable thing on the map.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.Cheat.RemoveInfusion: Select an infusable thing, then choose one infusion to remove.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.Cheat.RemoveAllInfus: Confirm, then select an infusable thing to remove all infusions from it.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.Infuse.Window.Title: Select Infusion
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.Infuse.Window.Search: Search by infusion label or defName.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.RemoveInfusion.Windo: Search by infusion label or defName.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.RemoveAllInfusions.W: Select Confirm, then choose a thing on the map.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.Message.InvalidTarge: Target must be an infusable thing.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.Infuse.Message.Selec: Select a thing for {0}. Right-click to stop targeting.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.Infuse.Message.NoneA: No active infusions are currently available.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.RemoveInfusion.Messa: Select a thing for {0}. Right-click to stop targeting.
LanguageData.CheatMenu.Infusion2.RemoveAllInfusions.M: Select a thing for {0}. Right-click to stop targeting.
